Academy module

AI content creation and media production training.

Built for

Teams that need publish-ready AI media workflows.

01

Marketing teams

Campaign visuals, scripts, captions, and prompt libraries built around real briefs.

02

Agencies and creators

Short-form video, voiceover, image generation, and platform-ready asset packaging.

03

Corporate departments

Governance checklists, approval workflows, and bilingual Arabic/English QA standards.

Programs

One training package. Thirty seats.

AI Content Creation & Media Production Training is $200 per seat. Registration is linked to the email used at checkout.

Limited seats

AI Content Creation & Media Production Training

12 hours 30 seats Tarek Bacha
$200
From Prompt to Production: hands-on AI content and media creation.
Limited intake: 30 seats only. Enrollment closes when seats are filled.
  • Build prompt libraries, campaign images, scripts, storyboards, and short-form video assets
  • Create brand-ready image, video, and voice outputs with Arabic and English workflows
  • Leave with templates, QA rubrics, governance checklists, and a 30-day action plan
What's included

Hands-on outputs from prompt to production.

Skills built

  • Prompt engineering for brand-controlled image, copy, video, and voice output
  • AI image generation, visual systems, and campaign variants
  • Short-form video scripting, storyboard planning, and first-cut production
  • Arabic and English tone control, QA, compliance, and governance workflows

Every participant gets

  • Prompt library v1 with reusable campaign, caption, visual, and tone prompts
  • Campaign image set, storyboard, video draft, and voiceover alternatives
  • Brief form, storyboard template, versioning guide, and export checklist
  • Governance one-pager, approval checklist, and 30-day action plan
FAQ

Common questions before enrollment.

Do I need a technical background?

No. Training focuses on execution and workflows for business, content and media work.

Is Arabic and English available?

Yes. Programs run in Arabic, English, or bilingual format.

How is payment linked to my account?

Registration is created first, then Stripe checkout opens. Both share the same email.

I already registered — how do I log in?

Use the Login form at the top of this page.
